component.name: Clash GNOME
component.summary: Modern GNOME frontend for the mihomo (Clash Meta) proxy

description.p: Clash GNOME is a native GTK4 + libadwaita GUI for the mihomo (Clash Meta) proxy core. It provides:

ul.li: Proxy group selection and latency testing
TUN mode with system stack support
Autostart integration and background hidden mode

description.p: Bundle the mihomo core with the .deb and tarball; add manual core updates.

ul.li: Ship mihomo in the release artifacts under /usr/lib/clash-gnome/mihomo
Settings: check for and install mihomo updates in place
Dashboard banner offers a one-click install when no core is found
Configurable GitHub proxy for users behind restricted networks
